name: Orbit Rerun Startup Contract
description: Stage the Orbit rerun from a fresh main-based lane with explicit learning carry-forward, product gates, and a deterministic handoff into the live execution surface.

notes: Use the Orbit execution checklists, rerun-prep artifact, explicit attempt artifact paths, explicit retrospective path, and declared execution session routing as the source of truth for the rerun.
Carry forward prior-attempt lessons explicitly; do not restart from vibes or thread memory alone.
Use the exact manifest-approved lane branch for the attempt; do not infer branch identity from the latest historical run.
Treat this intent as a startup-only contract and hand the live lane to the named execution session before substantive implementation begins.
Record the rerun-prep path plus the attempt-specific product, interaction, validation, participant-evidence, and retrospective paths explicitly before handoff.
Do not call the branch review-ready or MVP candidate before the product acceptance checklist and interaction-quality review both exist.
Make actual participants and participant evidence explicit; planned roles are not the same as active contributors.
Use an attempt-specific evidence packet path and preserve earlier attempt artifacts as historical evidence.
Do not promote process changes or rerun success claims without AJ review.
